proposition: FaMe logistics s.r.o. v likvidaci (IČO 02019396; founded 2013 as FaMe group s.r.o., renamed 2015) is co-owned by Václav Faraga (33 %), Petr Faraga (34 %) and Tomáš Melichárek (33 %); all three are jednatelé since 23 Aug 2013, and Václav Faraga is the registered likvidátor since 1 Mar 2021. Martin Patrik Faraga — a fourth person with the Faraga surname — was a founding 50 % shareholder and jednatel until 2015.
